---
title: Templates Library
description: All downloadable artifacts from the AI Council Toolkit in one place.
full: true
---

The most-used templates are available as standalone downloads in PDF, Word, and Markdown formats. Logs and registers are available as CSV files you can open in any spreadsheet application. Simpler templates can be copied directly from their documentation pages using the copy button on each code block.

## Foundation Pack

| Template | Description | Format |
|----------|------------|--------|
| [Model Charter](/docs/foundation/charter) | Mission, scope, authority, accountability, and governance structure | [PDF](/templates/ai-council-charter.pdf) / [Word](/templates/ai-council-charter.docx) / [Markdown](/templates/charter.md) |
| [Principles](/docs/foundation/principles) | Model principles set aligned to international standards | [Copy from page](/docs/foundation/principles#copy-this-template) |
| [Roles and Membership](/docs/foundation/roles-and-membership) | Role definitions and membership criteria | [Copy from page](/docs/foundation/roles-and-membership#copy-this-template) |
| [Agenda Template](/docs/foundation/meetings-and-decisions) | Standard council meeting agenda | [Copy from page](/docs/foundation/meetings-and-decisions#copy-this-template) |
| [Decision Log](/docs/foundation/meetings-and-decisions) | Template for recording council decisions | [CSV](/templates/decision-log.csv) |
| [Escalation Matrix](/docs/foundation/escalation-paths) | Triggers, destinations, and response times | [Copy from page](/docs/foundation/escalation-paths#copy-this-template) |

## Intake & Triage Pack

| Template | Description | Format |
|----------|------------|--------|
| [AI Inventory](/docs/intake-and-triage/ai-inventory) | System-of-record template for all AI systems | [CSV](/templates/ai-inventory.csv) |
| [Use Case Registration Form](/docs/intake-and-triage/use-case-registration) | Intake form for new AI use cases | [PDF](/templates/ai-council-use-case-registration.pdf) / [Word](/templates/ai-council-use-case-registration.docx) / [Markdown](/templates/use-case-registration.md) |
| [Risk Tiering Worksheet](/docs/intake-and-triage/risk-tiering) | Risk classification framework and scoring | [PDF](/templates/ai-council-risk-tiering-worksheet.pdf) / [Word](/templates/ai-council-risk-tiering-worksheet.docx) / [Markdown](/templates/risk-tiering-worksheet.md) |
| [Routing Logic](/docs/intake-and-triage/routing-logic) | Decision tree for case routing | [Copy from page](/docs/intake-and-triage/routing-logic#copy-this-template) |
| [Vendor AI Assessment Checklist](/docs/intake-and-triage/vendor-checklist) | Lifecycle guide and checklist for procured AI | [PDF](/templates/ai-council-vendor-checklist.pdf) / [Word](/templates/ai-council-vendor-checklist.docx) / [Markdown](/templates/vendor-ai-checklist.md) |

| Template | Description | Format |

| [Model Card Template](/docs/review-and-assurance/model-cards-and-datasheets) | Standardized model documentation | [Copy from page](/docs/review-and-assurance/model-cards-and-datasheets#copy-this-template) |

| [Security Review Checklist](/docs/review-and-assurance/security-review) | AI-specific security assessment | [Copy from page](/docs/review-and-assurance/security-review#copy-this-template) |
| [Red-Team Plan](/docs/review-and-assurance/red-teaming) | Adversarial testing plan template | [Copy from page](/docs/review-and-assurance/red-teaming#copy-this-template) |
| [Human Oversight Worksheet](/docs/review-and-assurance/human-oversight) | Oversight level assessment | [Copy from page](/docs/review-and-assurance/human-oversight#copy-this-template) |

## Operations & Maintenance Pack

| Template | Description | Format |
|----------|------------|--------|
| [Monitoring Calendar](/docs/operations/monitoring) | Periodic review schedule by tier | [Copy from page](/docs/operations/monitoring#copy-this-template) |
| [Incident Report](/docs/operations/incidents) | AI incident documentation template | [Copy from page](/docs/operations/incidents#copy-this-template) |
| [Incident Log](/docs/operations/incidents) | Running log of AI incidents and near-misses | [CSV](/templates/incident-log.csv) |
| [Policy Refresh Schedule](/docs/operations/policy-refresh) | Review frequency for each governance artifact | [Copy from page](/docs/operations/policy-refresh#copy-this-template) |
| [Quarterly Report](/docs/operations/reporting) | Executive sponsor reporting template | [Copy from page](/docs/operations/reporting#copy-this-template) |
| [Annual Report](/docs/operations/reporting) | Board-level annual review template | [Copy from page](/docs/operations/reporting#copy-this-template) |
| [Council Health Check](/docs/operations/health-check) | Maturity self-assessment across 20 capabilities | [Copy from page](/docs/operations/health-check#copy-this-template) |
